summary: TeeEvidencePolicy the E1 device ships for local-only operation: the elizaOS agent runtime, local inference, NPU runtime, weights, and user data all run inside the on-device CoVE TVM, and the verifier is on-device (eliza-local-verifier). Private inference is gated on the chip NPU confidential-I/O lane: claims.npuProtected + a measurements.npuFirmware golden digest, matching assertNpuPrivateInferenceAllowed('local') in packages/agent/src/services/tee-confidential-inference.ts. This is the shape consumed by evaluateTeeEvidencePolicy (tee-policy.ts).
